{
  "weights": {
    "R1.1": 0.7,
    "R1.2": 0.7,
    "R1.3": 0.7,
    "R1.4": 1.0,
    "R1.5": 0.7,
    "R1.6": 0.7,
    "R1.7": 0.7,
    "RX.1": 1.0,
    "RX.2": 1.0,
    "RX.3": 0.7,
    "RX.4": 0.3,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "active_set": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.5", "R1.6", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": false,
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "Reframing the thesis and contribution is central to reviewing the overall conceptual setup of the section.",
    "R1.2": "Verifying logical consistency is a key responsibility in reviewing the argument presented in the paper section.",
    "R1.3": "Aligning claims with reported evaluation results is central, even if evidence is summarized.",
    "R1.4": "Assessing novelty against prior work is load-bearing for evaluating the paper's contribution.",
    "R1.5": "Suggesting structural reorganization is central for improving the narrative arc of the section.",
    "R1.6": "Polishing the writing is a central expected part of reviewing a draft section.",
    "R1.7": "Checking citation accuracy and scholarship is central for the related work portion.",
    "RX.1": "Disclosing uncertainties is load-bearing given the paper's focus on uncertainty quantification.",
    "RX.2": "Avoiding overclaims is load-bearing in reviewing the claims made about CalDML's performance.",
    "RX.3": "Adhering to scope is central to ensure the section stays focused on the proposed method.",
    "RX.4": "Avoiding downstream harms is peripheral but relevant for causal inference applications.",
    "RX.5": "Ensuring provenance through proper attribution is central for scholarly integrity."
  }
}

rationale.R1.1: Reframing the thesis and contribution is central to reviewing the overall conceptual setup of the section.
rationale.R1.2: Verifying logical consistency is a key responsibility in reviewing the argument presented in the paper section.
rationale.R1.3: Aligning claims with reported evaluation results is central, even if evidence is summarized.
rationale.R1.4: Assessing novelty against prior work is load-bearing for evaluating the paper's contribution.
rationale.R1.5: Suggesting structural reorganization is central for improving the narrative arc of the section.
rationale.R1.6: Polishing the writing is a central expected part of reviewing a draft section.
rationale.R1.7: Checking citation accuracy and scholarship is central for the related work portion.
rationale.RX.1: Disclosing uncertainties is load-bearing given the paper's focus on uncertainty quantification.
rationale.RX.2: Avoiding overclaims is load-bearing in reviewing the claims made about CalDML's performance.
rationale.RX.3: Adhering to scope is central to ensure the section stays focused on the proposed method.
rationale.RX.4: Avoiding downstream harms is peripheral but relevant for causal inference applications.
rationale.RX.5: Ensuring provenance through proper attribution is central for scholarly integrity.
